text.title: ADR Decay Detector Agent Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of kb-adr-decay-detector-agent. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Detector skips ADRs older than 6 months; misses long-rotted decisions.
antipattern.fix: Scan all; rely on caching to keep runs cheap.

antipattern.symptom: Findings printed; nobody reads; decay accumulates.
Detector flags ADR as contradicted but doesn't show the conflicting code; reviewer dismisses.
